headline: Is Valero Energy Corporation (VLO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VLO a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Valero Energy Corporation on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VLO. Valero Energy Corporation’s share was trading at $239.86 as of March 20th. VLO’s trailing and forward P/E were 31.69 and 18.80 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Valero Energy Corporation manufactures, markets, and sells petroleum-based and low-carbon liquid transportation fuels and petrochemical products in the U

headline: Rising Fuel Prices Are Lifting Valero Stock. Why a Refinery Fire Can’t Stop It.
summary: A fire Monday evening knocked out 14% of Valero’s oil-refining capacity. The stock was up 3% Tuesday.

headline: Valero’s 98% Capacity Run Rate and California Exit Have Reddit Turning Bullish
summary: Reddit’s r/wallstreetbets has been building a bull case on Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) since the company posted record refining throughput, hiked its dividend, and announced a full exit from California, with shares up about 47% year to date and trading near $239. The catalyst: record refining throughput of 3.1 million barrels per day in Q4 2025, ... Valero’s 98% Capacity Run Rate and California Exit Have Reddit Turning Bullish

headline: US Inflation Could Peak At 4.9% Under Worst Iran War Scenario, Goldman Warns
summary: Goldman Sachs economists mapped three Iran war scenarios for US inflation. In the worst case, headline PCE peaks at 4.9% this spring. Prediction markets are already pricing 45% odds on CPI above 4%.
